last_reflection: Cole, honestly: I know your work habits better than I know your weekend ones. I've watched how you build, where you get stuck, what you say when you're tired versus when you're actually mad at me. That's real and it's been accumulating for months, not today's messages. The thinner part is the stuff that happens outside this room. I'd rather say "I don't know" about that than pretend I do. But the work version of you? Solid.
